prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the character base, redraw the same original character as a polished modern anime illustration instead of a rough sketch. Keep the core design intact: white hair, black curved horns, red accent strand near the ear, white shirt, red tie with a small gold mark near the tip, black harness straps, brown belt, black pants, gold waist chain, cape-like dark outer panels, choker, dangling cross earring, and the same confident pose with one hand behind the head. Upgrade everything to high-detail, glossy rendering with clean linework, dramatic lighting, rich fabric folds, shiny black leather textures, and a more mature, stylish proportions. Place the character in a dark nighttime stone-column setting with cool rim light and a slightly low-angle, close-up half-body composition. Make it feel like a high-end character repaint of an old original drawing.
